choose_one_or_more_ai: Khetha umuntu oyedwa noma ngaphezulu we-AI ongamfaka kule ngxoxo.
title: {isihloko}
heading: {isihloko}
we_encountered_an_unexpected_error: Sihlangabezane nephutha ebesililindele. Lokhu kungase kube okwesikhashana.
terms_of_use_content_is: Okuqukethwe kweMigomo Yokusebenzisa akutholakali ngolimi lwakho.
virtualmd_provides_ai_powered_health: I-VirtualMD ihlinzeka ngolwazi lwezempilo olunamandla e-AI kanye nezinsizakalo zokweluleka. Abeluleki bethu be-AI ababona ochwepheshe bezokwelapha abanelayisensi futhi abakwazi ukuthatha indawo yokunakekelwa kwezokwelapha okuchwepheshile.
always_consult_with_qualified_healthcare: Hlala uthintana nabahlinzeki bezempilo abaqeqeshiwe ukuze uthole ukuxilongwa nokwelashwa. Esimeni esiphuthumayo sezokwelapha, shayela abezimo eziphuthumayo ngokushesha.
by_using_this_service_you: Ngokusebenzisa le sevisi, uyavuma ukuthi i-VirtualMD iyithuluzi lokufundisa nelolwazi kuphela.
use_of_this_service_is: Ukusetshenziswa kwale sevisi kungaphansi Kwemigomo Yesevisi kanye Nenqubomgomo Yobumfihlo. Ulwazi lwakho lwezempilo luvikelekile futhi lusingathwa ngokuvumelana nemithetho yobumfihlo esebenzayo.
virtualmd_is_a_registered_trademark: I-VirtualMD wuphawu lokuthengisa olubhalisiwe. Ukusetshenziswa okungagunyaziwe akuvunyelwe.
